title: Fix README example of buildah config
body:
The example needs to use config argument before the container name,
otherwise it is failing with: too many arguments specified.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

@TristanCacqueray Thanks for the PR, but you need to sign it so we can merge.

git commit -a --ammend -s
git push --force

Should fix this problem

LGTM
